blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,354 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Winds averaging 27 mph will be noticeable on exposed terrain.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F, winds around 27 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F, gusts to 45 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
